addToBlocklist(address[]).details: This function will ignore tokens that are already in the Blocklist no events will be emitted in this case

params._tokens: - List of tokens to add to Blocklist

params._nftFee: - Flat fee in wei that applies to NFT transactions

changeTreasury(address).details: This will change the address of the contract we're sending the fees to in the future it won't transfer tokens already in the treasury

params._isInclusive: - Whether the amount passed in is inclusive of the fee

params._commitments: - number of commitments out this verification key is for
params._nullifiers: - number of nullifiers this verification key is for

initializeRailgunLogic(address,uint120,u.details: OpenZeppelin initializer ensures this can only be called once This function also calls initializers on inherited contracts

params._nftFee: - Flat fee in wei that applies to NFT transactions
params._treasury: - address to send usage fees to

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

removeFromBlocklist(address[]).details: This function will ignore tokens that aren't in the blocklist no events will be emitted in this case

params._tokens: - List of tokens to remove from blocklist

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._commitments: - number of commitments out this verification key is for
params._nullifiers: - number of nullifiers this verification key is for

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

addToBlocklist(address[]).notice: Adds tokens to Blocklist, only callable by owner (governance contract)

changeFee(uint120,uint120,uint256).notice: Change fee rate for future transactions

changeTreasury(address).notice: Change treasury address, only callable by owner (governance contract)

checkSafetyVectors().notice: Safety check for badly behaving code

getInsertionTreeNumberAndStartingIndex(u.notice: Gets tree number that new commitments will get inserted to

getTokenID((uint8,address,uint256)).notice: Gets token ID value from tokenData

hashBoundParams((uint16,uint72,uint8,uin.notice: Calculates hash of transaction bound params for snark verification

removeFromBlocklist(address[]).notice: Removes token from blocklist, only callable by owner (governance contract)

setTestingMode(bool).notice: POC: Enable or disable testing mode (bypasses SNARK verification)

shield(((bytes32,(uint8,address,uint256).notice: Shields requested amount and token, creates a commitment hash from supplied values and adds to tree

sumCommitments((((uint256,uint256),(uint.notice: Sums number commitments in transaction batch

transact((((uint256,uint256),(uint256[2].notice: Execute batch of Railgun snark transactions
